title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank Imperium Platinum Credit Card is a secured credit card issued on the VISA platform. With this card one can avail Credit Card facility against their own Fixed Deposit(s). 
For further details call Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest IDBI Bank branch. 
The digitised Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format. 
Enjoy credit limit as high as 85% of your Fixed deposit(s). 
Enjoy higher cash withdrawal limit up to 70% of your credit limit. 
The Imperium Platinum Credit Card is your exchequer. You will earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs. 150 spent on shopping, watching movies, traveling etc. So shop till you drop with your Imperium Platinum Credit Card and earn Delight Points which can be redeemed against irresistible offers from globally renowned brands. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
  * 500 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,500 or more within 30 days of card activation.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 1 lakhs.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.


***Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories**
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due. *Refer MITC for more details 
Get more freedom with your Platinum Credit Card. You can use it at over 9 lakh merchants in India and over 29 million merchants abroad. 
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank. 
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family members (only for members above 18 years) an add-on Imperium Platinum Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The Delight Points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility. 
Customers will be eligible for exclusive offers on airport shopping, hotel, car rentals etc. which are provided for Imperium Platinum cardholde Rs. Customers can enjoy travel concierge services provided by VISA for their travel related services. These offers are provided by VISA and may change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice. For more details please 
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of 400 to 4000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. *Maximum waiver of upto 300 per month.   
| On spends of more than Rs. 75,000/- in a year  |  
| --- |  
| 2.5% of transaction fee or Rs. 500/-, whichever is higher  |  
| Late Payment Fess (Per occasion , Based on amount due)  | < = Rs. 500 – Nil > Rs.500 to <= Rs. 5000 – Rs.400 > Rs.5000 to < = Rs. 10000 - Rs.500 > Rs.10000 to < = Rs. 20000 - Rs.750 > Rs.20000 – Rs.950   |  
| 2.5% of over limit amount subject to minimum of Rs. 500  |  
 |  
| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Interest Rate: 13% per Annum Processing and Foreclosure Fees: Nil EMI Tenure Options: 3, 6, 9 or 12 month   |  
| Minimum Amount: Rs. 3000/- Processing Fee: 1.5% of BT amount or Rs. 199/- whichever is higher, Normal Interest rate for EMI will apply  |  
 |  
  * The Primary & Add-on cardholder should be 18 years and above.
  * Minimum eligible Fixed Deposit amount for issuance of Imperium Secured Credit Card is 20,000/- or its equivalent FCNR deposits.
  * Fixed deposit(s) held by HUF, Minor, NGO, Trust, Societies, Club, Partnership and Private & Public Ltd. companies; Third Party Fixed Deposit(s); FDs with sweep-out facility; Tax Savings FDs;and FDs in combination of INR & FCNR (foreign currency) shall not be eligible for availing Imperium Secured Credit Card facility.
  * Mode of operations - Singly, ‘Either/Anyone/Former or Survivor’ and not jointly operated accounts.

The above eligibility criteria are only indicative. The Bank reserves the right to approve or decline applications for Credit Card.

The above list is only indicative and documents required may vary on a case to case basis.
Get a Imperium Platinum Credit Card in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - Non Toll Free - (24x7 service)
